accessibilityTree:
- banner:
  - button "Back"
  - heading "Walk Wizard" [level=1]
  - button "Help"
  - paragraph: Duration & interests
- main:
  - region "Walk duration controls":
    - heading "Walk duration" [level=2]
    - text: 60 minutes
    - slider "Walk duration slider"
  - region "Interests":
    - heading "Interests" [level=2]
    - text: 2 selected
    - toolbar "Select walk interests":
      - button "Parks & Nature"
      - button "Coffee Spots"
      - button "Street Art" [pressed]
      - button "Historic Sites"
      - button "Waterfront" [pressed]
      - button "Street Food"
      - button "Markets"
- contentinfo:
  - button "Continue to preferences"
- button "Controls"
